questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'd3fc1975-9c37-4e27-af06-82f690821eef' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = 'a4763362-b90d-40c3-a611-7aef922268ec'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'd3fc1975-9c37-4e27-af06-82f690821eef'; delete from question_items where id = 'd3fc1975-9c37-4e27-af06-82f690821eef';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
